mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTNOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO projectnotice ( noticenum, projectid, subject, content, hitcount, regdate, isnotice, state, authorempid ) VALUES ( #{noticenum}, #{projectid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSDATE, #{isnotice}, 1, #{authorempid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE projectnotice SET subject = #{subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isnotice = #{isnotice}, updatedate = SYSDATE WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum}
UPDATE projectnotice SET state = 0 WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum}
UPDATE projectnotice SET hitcount = hitcount + 1 WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projectnotice WHERE state = 1 AND projectid = #{projectid}
AND (subject LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT n.noticenum, n.projectid, n.subject, n.content, n.hitcount, n.isnotice, n.state, TO_CHAR(n.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regdate, TO_CHAR(n.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updatedate, n.authorempid, e.name AS authorName, p.title AS projectName FROM projectnotice n LEFT JOIN employee2 e ON n.authorempid = e.empId LEFT JOIN project p ON n.projectid = p.projectid WHERE n.noticenum = #{noticenum}
SELECT ep.projectid, p.title AS projectname, ep.role FROM empproject ep JOIN project p ON ep.projectid = p.projectid WHERE ep.empid = #{empId} ORDER BY p.projectname
SELECT filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, noticenum FROM projectnoticefile WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum} ORDER BY filenum ASC
